name: agy
description: Use the Google Antigravity CLI (`agy`) from inside Claude Code. Synchronous Bash wrapper: /agy:setup, /agy:ask, /agy:delegate, /agy:research, /agy:review, /agy:image, /agy:scrape, /agy:doc-to-md, /agy:help. Node.js companion: /agy:rescue (background-capable), /agy:status, /agy:result, /agy:cancel. Read-only commands run agy outside your repo; scrape/doc-to-md add SSRF + path deny-lists. Per-call model selection via --model. Cross-platform, 245 tests.
